records.question: Which universities have an enrollment of at least 2100 and basketball teams named Duke with an all_home record of exactly 15–1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.all_home = '15–1' AND basketball_match.team_name = 'Duke' AND university.enrollment >= 2100.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.School_ID
FROM university u
JOIN basketball_match b ON u.School_ID = b.School_ID
WHERE u.Enrollment >= 2100
  AND b.Team_Name = 'Duke'
  AND b.All_Home = '15–1'
